Open-source & Free Forever

Open-source software for animal welfare teams.

Track animals, find funding, publish adoptable pets, and keep your data local. Free, open-source, and built for real rescue teams.

Download FreeView GitHub

Local-first
Your data stays on your machine

Open-source
Auditable and forkable forever

Grant-ready
Built-in Funding Radar module
⚡
One-click install
No server setup required

Everything your team needs in one place

From intake to adoption, from lost pets to grant applications — Open Paw handles the operational work so your team can focus on the animals.

Animal Records

Complete intake records, status pipeline from intake to adoption, microchip IDs, photos, and private notes.

Foster & Adoption Workflows

Track foster placements, adoption applications, and volunteer tasks in one clear board.

Veterinary-Lite Records

Vaccinations, medications, procedures, weight history, and restricted medical notes — all role-controlled.

Lost & Found

Public report intake, description matching, internal review workflow, and reunification tracking.

Funding Radar

Funder database, grant calendar, eligibility checker, and AI-assisted narrative drafts with human approval.

Public Adoption Pages

Publish polished adoption profiles with approved fields only. Private notes never leak to the public.

Built for the people doing the work

Whether you're a solo rescuer, a mid-size shelter, or a fiscal sponsor supporting multiple programs, Open Paw scales with your organization.

🐕

Animal Rescues

From one-person operations to multi-state networks

🏢

Shelters

Municipal and private shelter management

🏠

Foster Networks

Coordinate fosters, track placements, manage tasks

⚕️

Vet Welfare Clinics

Medical records, spay/neuter tracking, continuity of care

🩺

Spay/Neuter Programs

Intake, procedure tracking, and follow-up workflows

📊

Fiscal Sponsors

Multi-tenant support for sponsored animal welfare programs

First-class feature

Funding Radar

Animal welfare organizations leave money on the table because grant research is slow and disorganized. Funding Radar keeps your funder database, deadlines, and applications in one place — with AI-assisted drafting that requires human review.

  • Funder database with focus areas and contact info
  • Grant calendar with deadline alerts
  • Eligibility checklist against your org profile
  • AI narrative draft — reviewed before submission
  • Budget builder and impact report generator
  • Application workspace and status tracking
Learn more about Funding Radar
Grant Pipeline
Petco Love Lost Grant
Up to $25,000
Identified
ASPCA Saving Lives Grant
Up to $50,000
Drafting
PetSmart Charities
Up to $15,000
Submitted
Local Foundation Grant
Up to $5,000
Awarded

Local SQLite

Your database lives on your machine. No cloud required.

Role-based access

Volunteers, vets, admins — each sees only what they need.

Full audit log

Every write is logged. Know who changed what and when.

No diagnosis AI

Medical diagnoses are never automated. Humans stay in control.

Your data, your rules.

Open Paw is local-first by default. Your animal records, medical notes, and donor information are stored on your machine — not sold to a cloud provider, not accessible without your permission.

Cloud sync is optional. Self-hosted deployment is supported. The source code is open and auditable. You are never locked in.

Read our security model

Run it your way

Desktop app, shelter office server, or self-hosted cloud — Open Paw fits how your organization works.

Coming Soon

Desktop App

One-click install on Mac, Windows, or Linux. Local encrypted database. Works offline.

V1

Local Network

Run on a shelter office server. Multiple staff access from their desktops without internet.

Roadmap

Self-hosted Cloud

Docker Compose deployment with PostgreSQL and object storage for multi-location teams.

Help us build it

Open Paw is built by volunteers who care about animal welfare. If you write Rust, TypeScript, or just have strong opinions about animal welfare workflows — we want to hear from you.

View on GitHubGood First Issues

Help animal welfare teams spend less time fighting software and more time helping animals.

Download Open Paw for free. No account required. Your data stays yours.

Open Paw

Free, open-source, local-first software for animal rescues, shelters, and welfare teams.

License: AGPL-3.0 — Built for the people doing the work.
